style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow intensely along Porygon's edges, emitting shimmering heat waves that distort the air. Ember sparks float upward in a chaotic, fiery pattern, crackling with vibrant orange and crimson energy. A dynamic, pulsing crimson aura radiates outward in concentric rings, casting a warm amber glow that illuminates the surrounding space with intense heat. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
